---

## Why It Works

This content works because it's a contrarian take on what people should actually care about. The opinion is that industry disruptions, building a unicorn company, or making a Forbes list are all overrated, while a second set of things are underrated. This divides people into 2 camps and generates a lot of commotion.

## Template

I'll never {Cliche Good Thing 1}, {Cliche Good Thing 2}, or {Cliche Good Thing 3}.
But I'll {Contrarian Good Thing 1}, {Contrarian Good Thing 2}, and {Contrarian Good Thing 3}.
